response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems at scale, and their recent career gap further undermines continuity.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Proven ability to lead ambiguous projects (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: Only sporadic C++ use (e.g., bachelor thesis), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or large-scale distributed systems leadership
Recent career gap and lack of recent technical leadership roles in cloud/DevOps
